paper_title: Sample and Analytical Methods in Basalt Quarry Study

methods.description: Process for collecting sand samples from a basalt quarry and preparing them for isotope analysis.

steps.description: A sand sample (JB40) was collected in an active basalt quarry close to Qunli village.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sand sample from basalt quarry

steps.description: The grains were wrapped in a simplified geological map of the study area.

methods.description: Procedures for analyzing zircon crystals extracted from sand samples, including degassing, spiking, and dissolution.

steps.description: Following degassing, the capsules were retrieved from the gas extraction line.
The zircon crystals were extracted from the capsules and spiked with calibrated 230 Th and 233 U solutions.
steps.searchable_summary: spike zircon crystals with Th and U solutions

steps.description: The crystals were dissolved for 5 days at 220 C in pressurized bombs using a mixture of double distilled 48% HF and 65% HNO3.
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve zircon crystals in HF and HNO3

methods.description: Analysis of spiked solutions using ICP-MS to check purity and calibration.

steps.description: Spiked solutions were analysed by a Thermo iCAP Q ICP-MS.
Procedural U and Th blanks by this method are usually very stable in a measurement session and below 1.5 pg.
steps.searchable_summary: validate U and Th blanks stability

methods.description: Application of Raman spectroscopy to zircon samples to identify thermal influence on the lattice.

steps.description: Raman spectroscopy was applied to all zircon samples to identify the thermal influence on the lattice.
steps.searchable_summary: apply Raman spectroscopy to zircon samples

steps.description: Fitted peak widths were corrected for the apparatus function.
steps.searchable_summary: correct Raman peak widths for apparatus function

methods.description: Analysis of zircon reset using kernel density plots and model fitting to determine the thermal history.

steps.description: Kernel density plot of the measured zircon (U-Th)/He ages and the best fitted model between the measured ages and calculated ages.
steps.searchable_summary: create kernel density plot for zircon ages

steps.description: The best fit line between the real data and the calculated model.
steps.searchable_summary: fit model to zircon age data

steps.description: K-S test: the Kolmogorov-Smirnov test for goodness of fit.
steps.searchable_summary: perform K-S test for model validation
